scripts.ci:ubuntu: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm typecheck && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --project apps/desktop/tsconfig.json && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm build && pnpm --filter tyrum-desktop exec playwright install chromium && xvfb-run -a --server-args="-screen 0 1920x1080x24" pnpm test --coverage.enabled --coverage.reporter=text-summary
scripts.pretypecheck: pnpm --filter @tyrum/contracts build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-policy build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/transport-sdk build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/node-sdk build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-node-control build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-execution build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/client build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/cli-utils build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/desktop-node build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/operator-app build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/operator-ui build && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('packages/contracts/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true}); fs.rmSync('packages/runtime-policy/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true}); fs.rmSync('packages/transport-sdk/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true}); fs.rmSync('packages/runtime-node-control/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true}); fs.rmSync('packages/runtime-execution/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true}); fs.rmSync('packages/gateway/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true})"
scripts.clean: find apps packages -type d -name dist -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.test:prepare: node scripts/check-native-sqlite.mjs && pnpm --filter @tyrum/contracts build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-policy build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/transport-sdk build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/node-sdk build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-node-control build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/runtime-execution build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/client build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/cli-utils build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/desktop-node build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/operator-app build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/operator-ui build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/gateway build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm lint:boundaries && node scripts/lint/oxlint-ratchet.mjs && node scripts/lint/check-raw-elements.mjs
